text: Shine, control and healthy brilliance are just a few of the benefits that you can achieve with
the new Revlon Laser Brilliance Collection. The unique lighted chambers emit far infrared heat
to help preserve hair's natural moisture balance and to keep hair from over drying. From straight
styles to soft flowing curls, this lineup has it all to give you beautiful unique looks and
healthy styles. First, turn on the Revlon Laser Brilliance Dryer to blow gentle heat through your
strands for the perfect blowout. Once your hair is dry, get ready to style. For curls,
section your hair into separate multiple layers using hair sectioning clips. Now,
turn the curling iron on and select the dial temperature that is best suited for your hair
type. When the light stops blinking, the unit is ready for use. Separate a 2-inch section of hair
and clamp the ends to the curling iron barrel. Roll the barrel up to the scalp and hold it for
a few seconds to set the hair in place. When the hair is dry, the hair is ready to style.
Once the hair is dry, the curl is ready to be styled. Release the hair by pressing the thumb
clamp and pull the hair away from the iron. Proceed with the other layers and repeat the process
until your hair is instantly transformed into soft, loose, flowing curls. For straight looks,
use the Revlon Laser Brilliance Straightener. Turn the unit on and select the temperature
setting that is best suited for your hair type. The power light will stop blinking when the unit
is ready for use. Section your hair into separate multiple layers using hair sectioning clips.
Separate a 2-inch section of hair and gently
place it between the smoothing plates. Clamp down firmly and glide the straightener down
the hair from root to tip. Repeat the process across sections of your hair until it is instantly
transformed into sleek, straight, glamorous styles. No matter which style you prefer,
the Revlon Laser Brilliance collection will give you revitalized, beautiful, healthy styles
that are perfect for any occasion.
